ns0:entry.ns0:title: GreptimeTeam/greptimedb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GreptimeTeam/greptimedb
Language: rust
The open-source Observability 2.0 database. One engine for metrics, logs, and traces — replacing Prometheus, Loki & ES.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/opendal
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/databendlabs/databend
Language: rust
Data Agent Ready Warehouse : One for Analytics, Search, AI, Python Sandbox. — rebuilt from scratch. Unified architecture on your S3.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core
Language: rust
dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/comprehensive-rust
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/comprehensive-rust
Language: rust
This is the Rust course used by the Android team at Google. It provides you the material to quickly teach Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iced-rs/iced
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iced-rs/iced
Language: rust
A cross-platform GUI library for Rust, inspired by Elm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kata-containers/kata-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers
Language: rust
Kata Containers is an open source project and community working to build a standard implementation of lightweight Virtual Machines (VMs) that feel and perform like containers, but provide the workload isolation and security advantages of VMs. https://katacontainers.io/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lance-format/lance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lance-format/lance
Language: rust
Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: louis-e/arnis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/louis-e/arnis
Language: rust
Generate any location from the real world in Minecraft with a high level of detail.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rivet-dev/agentos

A faster, lighter, cheaper alternative to sandboxes. Run any coding agent inside an isolated Linux VM, with agent orchestration built in.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
